C:\vscode\coursework\QT\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\decodeQRcode.dir/objects.a
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\decodeQRcode.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\decodeQRcode.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\decodeQRcode.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o decodeQRcode.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdecodeQRcode.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\decodeQRcode.dir\linkLibs.rsp
